articles.headline: Chilean KC-135 Tanker Refuels USAF F-35As on their Way to FIDAE 2026 Expo
articles.blurb: For the first time, a Chilean KC-135 refueled two U.S. F-35s that will take part in FIDAE 2026, marking the traditionally strong strategic ties between Chile and the U.S. A Chilean Air Force (Fuerza Aérea de Chile – FACh) KC-135E tanker aircraft refueled two U.S. Air Force F-35A Lightning IIs for...
articles.takeaway: Chile's first air-to-air refueling of U.S. F-35s demonstrates deepening military interoperability and signals Chile's strategic importance in Latin American defense partnerships.

articles.headline: The A-10C Can Now Use Probe and Drogue Refueling
articles.blurb: A new Probe Refueling Adapter, developed in response to an urgent combatant command requirement, allows the A-10 to significantly expand its refueling options as it is currently dependent on the KC-135. Few days after a photo circulated on social media, the Air National Guard Air Force Reserve...
articles.takeaway: A-10s can now access probe-and-drogue refueling from allied tankers, reducing operational dependence on limited KC-135 assets and improving sortie sustainability in contested environments.

articles.headline: 5 Aircraft That Define Modern Air Combat
articles.blurb: The warplanes at the top of the food chain.

articles.headline: Safety Culture in Aviation SMS
articles.blurb: How organizational culture shapes safety outcomes and what it takes to build a reporting culture that supports SMS.
articles.takeaway: Effective SMS relies on psychological safety that encourages frontline workers to report hazards without fear, directly reducing unreported safety risks in operations.

articles.headline: NASA’s Artemis II Crew Beams Official Moon Flyby Photos to Earth
articles.blurb: The first flyby images of the Moon captured by NASA’s Artemis II astronauts during their historic test flight reveal some regions no human has seen, including a rare in-space solar eclipse. Released Tuesday, astronauts captured the images April 6 during the mission’s seven-hour flyby of the lunar...
articles.takeaway: Artemis II's lunar flyby documented previously unobserved lunar regions and captured a rare in-space solar eclipse, providing crucial visual data for refining human Moon landing procedures.

articles.headline: Learjet Overruns Runway at Teterboro

articles.headline: Earthset

articles.headline: Towards Environmentally Sustainable Aviation: A Review on Operational Optimization
articles.blurb: Growing air traffic is straining airports and airspace while raising environmental concerns, and demand is only expected to increase. This paper reviews how advanced technologies and methods can expand capacity and improve efficiency across airline, airport, and flight operations. It also highlights emerging trends and gaps for future research in sustainable aviation.
articles.takeaway: Operational efficiency improvements across airlines, airports, and flight planning can address capacity constraints while simultaneously reducing aviation's environmental footprint without waiting for breakthrough technologies.
keywords: aviation; optimization; operations research; sustainability; environmental impacts
